description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Packages that runs on push to master branch or tags, on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build packages for Linux GCC, MSVC x64, and MSVC x86 configurations. For each configuration, it checks out the code, installs dependencies, sets up CMake, configures and builds the project, tests it if dispatched, packages the build, and uploads the artifact.
